temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with dark, wavy hair and a red plaid shirt over a plaid collared shirt gasps in shock. His eyes are wide and his mouth is wide open as he looks off-screen. He then turns his head to the side with a menacing, angry expression. (Storyline: The scene opens on a character reacting with shock and anger, setting a tense and confrontational mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Menacing, aggressive. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the man is in a bedroom. He is wearing jeans and a red sweater. He turns his back to the camera, holding a book in his right hand, and begins to aggressively bang the book against the closed door. (Storyline: The character's aggression escalates as he physically attacks the door, suggesting he is trying to force his way in or is in a state of extreme frustration.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Aggressive, threatening. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous score continues, and the sound of the book hitting the door is audible.)
